summary: The diff shows modifications to TechnicianFinder.tsx which addresses the overlapping icon issue mentioned in REQ-1, but the BuildRequest specifically mentions the LocationFinder component. The diff shows changes to LocationFinder.tsx (truncated) but the visible content doesn't show spacing/layout fixes. The TechnicianFinder.tsx changes show the icon moved from overlapping position to a proper flex layout with gap spacing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the overlapping issue between the 'Find local pest technicians' icon and the headings in the LocationFinder component
missing_requirements.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly mentions fixing the overlap in the LocationFinder component, but the diff shows LocationFinder.tsx is truncated and the visible content does not show any spacing or layout adjustments to address icon/heading overlap. The fixes appear to be in TechnicianFinder.tsx instead.
